proposedResolution.settlementText: We request a credit note of $11,360 covering the price variance of $8,520 (unit price discrepancy vs PO-4375) and quantity overbilling of $2,840 (500 units invoiced but not received per GRN-7685). The revised payable amount would be $51,184.

commsTrail.snippet: Re: INV-2024-8851 — We have identified pricing and quantity discrepancies totaling $11,360. Please review and issue a credit note.
Dispute DSP-001 has been created in the supplier portal with attached evidence.

proposedResolution.settlementText: Credit note requested for $8,187: $6,840 for 180 units invoiced but not received (GRN-7705 confirms 1,020 vs 1,200 invoiced), $547 tax adjustment, and $800 freight surcharge above contracted rate of $1,400.

commsTrail.snippet: Re: INV-2024-8890 — Quantity and freight discrepancies identified. Total adjustment requested: $8,187.
We acknowledge the qty difference. However, the freight charge reflects emergency shipping requested by your warehouse team on Jan 25.
We accept the freight explanation. Revised credit note request: $7,387 (qty + tax only).
